channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Common Walking Errors and How to Correct Them
item.description: Walking is an excellent low-impact exercise, but improper footwear, pace, or routine can hinder progress and potentially cause injury.

item.title: 11 Natural Methods to Reduce Cortisol Levels
Pediatric Hospitals Use Generative AI for Documentation and Care Coordination
item.description: Pediatric hospitals are adopting generative AI for documentation, care coordination, and workflow support, with near-term benefits in reducing administrative tasks.

item.title: Can Yogurt Help Prevent Colon Cancer?
